steps.name: Verify the page load with expected URL automationexercise and expected Title Automation Exercise
Click the menu - 'Contact us' on the AE Home page
Verify the page load with expected URL /contact_us and expected Title Contact Us
Verify Page Header - Get In Touch

Fill the contact us form with name-Autobot, email-autobot@gmail.com, subject-Query on New Test Cases for Performance, query-Hi There, Can you also add few test cases for performance testing the application.
Enter name in the contact form - 'Autobot'
Enter email in the contact form - 'autobot@gmail.com'
Enter subject in the contact form - 'Query on New Test Cases for Performance'

parameters.name: subject
parameters.value: Query on New Test Cases for Performance

steps.name: Enter query in the contact form - '{query}'

parameters.name: queryMessage
parameters.value: Hi There, Can you also add few test cases for performance testing the application.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.value: Query on New Test Cases for Performance

parameters.value: Hi There, Can you also add few test cases for performance testing the application.
